About
Relating hexagram

Relating Hexagram Guide

The relating hexagram shows the pattern created after changing lines move, giving context for where the situation may be heading.

Primary pattern first

Start with the primary hexagram. It names the current situation and gives the reading its base structure.

Relating pattern second

The relating hexagram is not a separate prediction. It describes the direction suggested by the changing lines.

Avoid overreading

Beginners often jump straight to the relating hexagram. A better approach is to compare both patterns and ask what kind of change connects them.

Try the tool

Cast a reading and compare the result with this guide.

Open tool
